name: AI provenance manifest: cost_telemetry block includes tokens_in, tokens_out, model, duration_ms, monetary_estimate_usd per §2.8
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --tokens-in 1000 --tokens-out 500 --model claude-opus --duration-ms 1500 && for k in tokens_in tokens_out model duration_ms monetary_estimate_usd; do grep -E "\"$k\":" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $k" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
